_comment: Unitree G1 reference pose. NOTE: base is kept at identity (no yaw rotation) on purpose, to match NVIDIA's official offset convention (where the SOMA->Mujoco yaw mismatch is absorbed entirely into offset.q rather than the base rotation). This means in the GUI Calibrate Mode the robot will face world +X while SOMA faces world -Y - a 90 degree visual offset is expected and correct. Compare the resulting joint_offsets against soma_to_g1_scaler_config.json (NVIDIA's hand-tuned values) directly.
